name: Bomber Nanimon

signature_move.name: Free Throw Bomb
signature_move.description: Throws bombs that never miss their mark.

description: It seems to be a subspecies of Nanimon , who came from the Digital World of another dimension to invade this one, but the truth is unclear. As its name suggests, its whole body has turned into a bomb, and it appears that its body became one as it continued to battle in the Digital World. Another of its features is that the hair on its calvaria has become a fuse. Its Special Moves are throwing bombs that never miss their mark ( Free Throw Bomb ), and unleashing a powerful explosive punch ( Baku Oyaji Punch ).
